subject: Re: AW: Reporty :151206_monthly_board_report_November.pdf
body:
Dear Nicole
Hope this email finds you well and happy. 
Amir, Reporty's CEO, told me that Alan called him and raise a possible interest of you to invest .5M if that's still in the original old valuation. 
It is somewhat regretful that Alan raised it with Amir rather than with me. Because me and JE didn't tell Reporty people of our arrangements. However, I don't see any major damage at this point. 
Anyhow, (if you've reached a conclusion that you're ready) we, JE and myself held this opportunity open for you. Of course it will make you an investor at the very first, old, low valuation. 
Please let us know if that's the case and Darren and Udi (JE and my lawyers respectively) can carry it on from here. 
If you need any further details for a decision to be made don't hesitate to call me. 
Best
Ehud Barak

Sent from my iPhone

> On 19 Dec 2015, at 23:51, ehbarak  wrote:
> 
> Dear Nicole
> Happy New year. May all your wishes fulfilled. 
> Amir (R's CEO) told me he had a good conversation with Alan, and another (?) person participated as well. 
> I'll be glad to here your impression from Alan.
> As you may remember I  want to convince you to consider entering in a proper way into it. 
> Let me know when can we talk.  
> Looking forward
> Best
> Ehud Barak
> 
> Sent from my iPhone
> 
>> On 8 Dec 2015, at 15:25, Nicole Junkermann | Junkermanngroup  wrote:
>> 
>> Dearest Ehud,
>> I hope this mail finds you well and you find time in this hectic,challenging environment to find some peace.Alan is planned to have a call with emir in the coming days.I would suggest we follow up once I have the feedback from this call.
>> Best
>> Nicole
>> 
>> Gesendet von meinem BlackBerry 10-Smartphone.
>> Originalnachricht
>> Von: ehbarak
>> Gesendet: Montag, 7. Dezember 2015 15:49
>> An: Nicole Junkermann | Junkermanngroup
>> Betreff: Reporty :151206_monthly_board_report_November.pdf
>> 
>> 
>> Hi Nicole
>> Please find attached the Nov. 15 report.
>> I would be glad to talk to you re
>> Reporty.
>> Can we have a
>> Telco£¿when?
>> Best
>> EB
>>
body_html:
Dear Nicole
Hope this email finds you well and happy.
Amir, Reporty's CEO, told me that Alan called him and raise a possible interest of you to invest .5M if that's still in the original old valuation.
It is somewhat regretful that Alan raised it with Amir rather than with me. Because me and JE didn't tell Reporty people of our arrangements. However, I don't see any major damage at this point.
Anyhow, (if you've reached a conclusion that you're ready) we, JE and myself held this opportunity open for you. Of course it will make you an investor at the very first, old, low valuation.
Please let us know if that's the case and Darren and Udi (JE and my lawyers respectively) can carry it on from here.
If you need any further details for a decision to be made don't hesitate to call me.
Best
Ehud Barak

Sent from my iPhone
